fullstack.title: NYT Strands Stats and Streaks
fullstack.description: My work as a NYT Games intern working on adding player statistics and streaks to Strands!

fullstack.title: The Michigan Daily Games
fullstack.description: A content management system with a user-facing crosswords player and links player.

fullstack.title: The Michigan Daily Mobile App
fullstack.description: An iOS and Android app that displays The Michigan Daily's latest news and stories.

fullstack.title: Alt Text Tracker
fullstack.alt: The Michigan Daily Alternative Text Tracker
fullstack.description: Tracks The Michigan Daily's use of alternative text and audits alternative text usage every day.

fullstack.title: Detroit-Windsor Mapping Puzzle
fullstack.description: An interactive puzzle to test your knowledge of Detroit's neighboring cities.

fullstack.title: Detroit Neighborhoods + Civic Census
fullstack.description: Community defined neighborhoods with a peer <a href='https://detroit-neighborhoods.pages.dev/civic' >Civic Census</a > that connects orgs to funding and tract-level stats.

webdesign.title: Elections Commentary 2024
webdesign.description: A website for The Michigan Daily Opinion endorsements, editorials, commentary and data graphics

webdesign.title: Love Notes 2024
webdesign.description: A website for The Michigan Daily Statement Love Edition, displaying love notes sent between students.

dataviz.title: Sappho in Data
dataviz.description: A fun visualization of Sappho's Fragments translated by Anne Carson in If Not, Winter, categorized using a machine learning algorithm.

dataviz.title: Live Election Trackers 2024
dataviz.description: Live trackers for voting wait times and result updates on the City of Ann Arbor proposals made for The Michigan Daily.
